overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Weston Plan Commission was scheduled to hold a regular meeting to consider a Conditional Use Permit application for an Accessory Dwelling Unit, review the final plat of the Bull Junior View Subdivision, consider a Specific Implementation Plan amendment for Tidal Wave Auto Spa, and receive monthly reports on certified survey maps, site plans, and building permits.

agenda.item: Call to Order – Roll Call & Declaration of Quorum
Open public comment period for items that do not appear on this agenda noted as public hearings
Minutes from May 11, 2026, Plan Commission Meeting
Public Hearing – Project #20260237 - Conditional Use Permit for Accessory Dwelling Unit at 4804 Shorey Avenue
Project #20250424 - Final Plat of Bull Junior View Subdivision (Reedy Builders/Vreeland)
Project #20260169 – Specific Implementation Plan (SIP) Amendment No. 2 - Tidal Wave Auto Spa, 6237 Business Highway 51
May & June 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
Future Agenda Items or Staff Referrals

discussions.item: Public Hearing – Project #20260237 - Conditional Use Permit for Accessory Dwelling Unit at 4804 Shorey Avenue
discussions.body: The Plan Commission was scheduled to hold a public hearing on a request for a Conditional Use Permit to allow an Accessory Dwelling Unit at 4804 Shorey Avenue pursuant to Section 94.4.09(8) of the Village of Weston Zoning Code. The hearing was set to include staff and applicant presentations, public comment, and discussion and action by the Plan Commission.

discussions.item: Project #20250424 - Final Plat of Bull Junior View Subdivision (Reedy Builders/Vreeland)
discussions.body: The Plan Commission was scheduled to consider the final plat for the Bull Junior View Subdivision, a project involving Reedy Builders and Vreeland. The specific details of the subdivision review were not detailed in the agenda.

discussions.item: Project #20260169 – Specific Implementation Plan (SIP) Amendment No. 2 - Tidal Wave Auto Spa, 6237 Business Highway 51
discussions.body: The Plan Commission was set to review and potentially act on a Specific Implementation Plan Amendment No. 2 for the Tidal Wave Auto Spa located at 6237 Business Highway 51. The nature of the proposed amendments was not specified in the agenda.

discussions.item: May & June 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
discussions.body: The Plan Commission was scheduled to review staff-approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans from May and June 2026 as part of its monthly reporting process.
The Plan Commission was set to review May 2026 building permits as part of its regular monthly reporting.
The Plan Commission was scheduled to review June 2026 building permits as part of its regular monthly reporting.

discussions.item: Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
discussions.body: The Plan Commission was set to receive a monthly project update report from the Planning & Development Department.

publicComment: Public comment was indicated on the agenda, with procedures available for both advance written submissions and live participation via Zoom.
actionItems: Scheduled to vote on approval of May 11, 2026, Plan Commission Meeting minutes
Scheduled to conduct public hearing and take action on Project #20260237 - Conditional Use Permit for Accessory Dwelling Unit at 4804 Shorey Avenue
Expected to consider and act on Project #20250424 - Final Plat of Bull Junior View Subdivision
Expected to consider and act on Project #20260169 – Specific Implementation Plan (SIP) Amendment No. 2 for Tidal Wave Auto Spa
title: Plan Commission - 7/13/2026
